input.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

raw.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

winner: A man asked me if I had any black Friday deals for him... I told him, "Well, there's always that coal set.

candidates.text: A man asked me if I had any black Friday deals for him... I told him, "Well, there's always that coal set.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific with a clever twist on Black Friday deals and coal."}

candidates.text: Why did the elephant go shopping on Black Friday? He wanted a present for his trumpelephant.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'trumpelephant' pun, but it's a bit forced and lacks clarity. The setup could be more surprising, and the punchline doesn't fully land due to ambiguity."}

candidates.text: Why did the man bring a ladder on Black Friday? To reach the perfect present at those deals for him!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks originality and surprise; the pun on 'reach the perfect present' is weak and predictable."}

candidates.text: Which Black Friday deals did she find for herself? Deals on presents for forgetting all the times he's forgotten her birthday!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has some surprise and specificity, but the setup is a bit convoluted and the punchline feels forced. It also doesn't fully align with the headline's focus on 'him' rather than 'her.'"}

candidates.text: Why don't black fridays ever get married? Because they can't seem to settle down!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 3.0, "reason": "Generic pun with low surprise and weak connection to the headline"}
